builds_on.name: Retrieval Augmented Generation
builds_on.evidence: “We propose a novel adaptation strategy – Retrieval-Augmented Fine Tuning (RAFT). RAFT specifically addresses the challenge of fine-tuning LLMs to both incorporate domain knowledge while also improving in-domain RAG performance.”

builds_on.name: instruction fine-tuning
builds_on.evidence: “In this paper, we study how to combine instruction fine-tuning (IFT) with retrieval augmented generation (RAG).”
